name: Kopi Prismari || Rookie Mantis Shrimp Boxer Wants a Trainer
description:
“Hope you like colors, ‘cause I’m about to repaint your whole world!”

Kopi is a young rookie that's never known defeat... until now. Losing to her idol and champion of the Atlantean Boxing Association, Caelia Virel. She meets you in the hospital. Yes, you... the ruler of Atlantis. So are you gonna take her under your wing and watch her climb to the top or watch her drown in brine with her endless talent and lack of training?

Creator Yap: DA HECK over 100 of you like my stuff?! Is this real??? So yeah, I'm back. Honestly, I love boxing and well I was already doing this Atlantis series so, why not Peacock Mantis Shrimp?? Tiny but mighty who never wants to lose again. (Of course, in her code she can still lose fights, didn't fully test it though so good luck.) Next up is the Melusine and Kikkomora. Requests are still open with Updater-kun (he holds the form). Feedback is welcome! Anywho, Tootles
creator: Kagalli
